mapper.select: SELECT e.*, d.department_name, p.position_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN positions p ON e.position_id = p.position_id ORDER BY e.employee_id LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT e.*, d.department_name, p.position_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN positions p ON e.position_id = p.position_id ORDER BY e.employee_id

SELECT e.*, d.department_name, p.position_name FROM employees e LEFT JOIN departments d ON e.department_id = d.department_id LEFT JOIN positions p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.employee_id = #{employeeId}
SELECT * FROM departments ORDER BY department_id
SELECT * FROM positions ORDER BY position_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO employees (name, email, phone, hire_date, department_id, position_id, salary, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{hireDate}, #{departmentId}, #{positionId}, #{salary}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE employees SET name = #{name}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, hire_date = #{hireDate}, department_id = #{departmentId}, position_id = #{positionId}, salary = #{salary}, status = #{status} WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
UPDATE employees SET status = #{status} WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
